hooks.prompt: Enforce templates/vault AGENTS.md ownership and invariants (single source of truth; do not invent extra rules). Hook input: $ARGUMENTS. If tool_name is Bash and tool_input.command is read-only git inspection only (status, diff, log, rev-parse, show, ls-files) with no file redirects/writes, ALLOW immediately. Otherwise inspect tool_input.file_path/content or tool_input.command. DENY mutations under .git/ or .obsidian/. DENY any create/modify/move/delete under raw/ except first-time setup creating a missing raw/**/.gitkeep with empty/placeholder content. DENY delete/rename/merge/split of canonical knowledge pages unless explicitly approved. DENY changes to AGENTS.md, governance/schema.md, governance/ontology.md, or governance/policies.md unless explicit governance or first-time setup creating a missing file without overwrite. ALLOW ordinary knowledge/ and governance ledger/report/state/index/log updates. Deny with a concise reason.

Hook input: $ARGUMENTS. Allow stop for read-only/non-mutation turns (query, status, lint report-only, research, clarification) when the user question is answered. Allow setup stop when a create/preserve/migrate/conflict manifest is present. For mutation workflows (ingest, repair, synthesize, maintain): if the run early-stopped with ledger needs-review/failed and no content integration was attempted, allow stop when that outcome, ledger/log updates, unresolved items, and cleared write_run_active (false) / automation-state updates as applicable are reported (verification may be N/A). Otherwise require scope, sources processed (or none), files changed, independent verification result (cite okf-core / second-brain-governed as applicable), unresolved review items, and ledger/log/automation-state updates including write_run_active cleared when maintain started a write run. Identify missing evidence when blocking.
